Palfinger · Deck Equipment

Palfinger PK 18500 Crane

Confirmed OEM spare parts for the Palfinger PK 18500 knuckle-boom crane — circlips, bearings, folding-arrow indicator.

Parts catalog
How to use this list: Part numbers match OEM service manuals. Use the request button below to ask about availability and pricing. Include the part number, quantity, and delivery port.
Part NumberDescription
EQ 304Circlip D 205 DIN 471 — PK 18500
HT7778Folding arrow / indicator — PK 18500
EQ 245Circlip D 195 DIN 471 — PK 18500
HT4424Bearing 3.0 mm — PK 18500
HT7042Bearing 3.1 mm — PK 18500
HT7043Bearing 3.2 mm — PK 18500
HT7044Bearing 3.3 mm — PK 18500
